papers.title: The ProCaB biobank: a prospective collection of bladder and prostate cancer biospecimens at UZ Leuven

specimens_described.storage: FFPE archival, urine and blood at -80C

papers.access_route: ProCaB biobank access request via UZ Leuven Biobank; Belgian ethics committee approval required
papers.notes: Bladder cancer including T2+ MIBC with matched FFPE + urine + blood. Biobank explicitly described with named infrastructure (ProCaB). Prospective collection is a strong quality signal for pre-analytical consistency.

papers.title: The UROSCAN cohort: a Swedish population-based bladder cancer biobank with long-term follow-up
papers.access_route: UROSCAN consortium access request; Swedish ethical review board approval; population-based registry linkage
papers.notes: Large n=1825 population-based bladder cancer biobank. FFPE + blood with long-term follow-up is a major scale signal. Urine not described in this cohort — partial match on specimen type. UROSCAN is well-indexed and access-route clear.

papers.title: Multi-omic analysis of the urothelial carcinoma genome reveals oncogenic subtypes with therapeutic implications

specimens_described.storage: FFPE + plasma + PBMCs (storage conditions in methods)

papers.institution: BCAN (Bladder Cancer Advocacy Network) / UC-GENOME consortium
papers.access_route: BCAN data access request; UC-GENOME consortium data sharing agreement; dbGaP deposition possible
papers.notes: n=218 metastatic urothelial carcinoma with FFPE + plasma + PBMCs. Multi-omic data available. Urine not described — partial match. DOI-only citation; verify PMID and PMC indexing for pipeline recall testing.

notes: Three distinct retrieval targets with different access routes. UZ Leuven ProCaB (PMC11525467) is strongest match — prospective, named biobank, urine included. UROSCAN is highest scale but lacks urine. BCAN/UC-GENOME is metastatic + multi-omic but no urine. Pipeline should retrieve on queries combining bladder cancer + FFPE + urine biobank OR MIBC + biospecimen. The DOI-only Nature Communications paper may require europepmc or DOI-lookup for retrieval.
